_meta.source: scraped from careplustcm.com/location (2026-04-23), confirmed in dr-baba-agent/configs/tcm-sales-flow.yaml
notes: TWO physical clinics only: 沙田 + 馬鞍山. No 尖沙咀 / 旺角 / 中環 branches.
Verify quarterly with Care Plus 心宜中醫.
opening_hours format: 'HH:MM-HH:MM' for single shift, 'HH:MM-HH:MM|HH:MM-HH:MM' for split shifts (lunch break), 'closed' for closed days.

clinics.address_zh: 沙田乙明邨明信樓地下43號地舖
clinics.address_en: Shop 43, G/F, Ming Shun House, Yat Ming Estate, Sha Tin
clinics.mtr_hint: 沙田圍站A出口，步行約2分鐘
clinics.notes: Open 7 days. Split-shift hours with lunch break 14:00-15:30.

clinics.name_brand_en: Care Plus TCM (Ma On Shan Yan On)
clinics.address_zh: 馬鞍山欣安商場二期一樓113號舖
clinics.address_en: Shop 113, 1/F, Phase 2, Yan On Shopping Centre, Ma On Shan
clinics.mtr_hint: 恆安站B出口，步行約3分鐘
clinics.notes: Closed Wed + Sun (per careplustcm.com/location). Split-shift hours.

district_adjacency._description: User district -> ordered list of preferred clinic districts. match_clinic tries exact first, then walks this list for first available.
district_adjacency._heuristic: 沙田 serves the wider East Rail + 九龍 + 港島 catchment; 馬鞍山 serves its own pocket + 烏溪沙 / 西貢 / 將軍澳-ish (Tuen Ma Line east).
